author: lOrm
content: Issue calls for a native GlobTool with parity to CC tools/GlobTool/GlobTool.ts (glob-pattern file matching as a first-class tool, distinct from filesystem read/grep). Not addressable in a cleanup pass: requires a new tool under src/tools/, parameter schema, glob crate integration with proper gitignore handling, system-prompt update, and tests. Multi-day feature work tracked under cc-parity label. Parent audit #523.
